entries.description: Total-loss auction recovery. Full panel replacement, structural repair, and factory-match paint restored to showroom condition.
Ground-up restoration. Rust repair, bodywork, concours-quality respray in classic red, and custom BBS wheel fitment.
Full shop-built restoration. Primer, bodywork, and premium silver respray with M-package front bumper and staggered wheels.
Side-panel collision repair. Masking, primer, bondo, and factory-match black repaint — delivered finished and insurance-ready.
Front-end collision repair. Towed in from the scene, restored bumper and fender, and returned to the road through insurance — deductible covered.
Rear-end collision repair with full quarter-panel restoration, bumper replacement, and color-matched refinish back to factory spec.
